steps.expression: async () => { const settings = await window.api.settings.getView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); const modelEntry = settings.ok ? Object.entries(settings.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider).find(([, models]) => Array.isArray(models) && models.length > 0) : undefined; const modelRefOrNull = modelEntry === undefined ? null : { providerId: modelEntry[0], modelId: modelEntry[1][0] }; const agentSave = await window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name: `UI Inspect Agent ${Date.now()}`, systemPrompt: 'Scenario helper agent.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: ['inspect'], modelRefOrNull }); if (!agentSave.ok) { return false; } const archivedCouncil = await window.api.councils.save({ viewKind: 'councilCreate', id: null, title: `UI Inspect Archived Council ${Date.now()}`, topic: 'Validate archived visual treatment', goal: 'Check archived cards stay interactive-looking', mode: 'manual', tags: ['inspect'], memberAgentIds: [agentSave.value.agent.id], memberColorsByAgentId: {}, conductorModelRefOrNull: null }); if (!archivedCouncil.ok) { return false; } const archiveResult = await window.api.councils.setArchived({ id: archivedCouncil.value.council.id, archived: true }); if (!archiveResult.ok) { return false; } const activeCouncil = await window.api.councils.save({ viewKind: 'councilCreate', id: null, title: `UI Inspect Active Council ${Date.now()}`, topic: 'Validate council view refresh controls', goal: 'Check shared compact refresh button styling', mode: 'manual', tags: ['inspect'], memberAgentIds: [agentSave.value.agent.id], memberColorsByAgentId: {}, conductorModelRefOrNull: null }); return activeCouncil.ok; }

() => { const archivedBadge = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === 'Archived'); const card = archivedBadge instanceof HTMLElement ? archivedBadge.closest('.home-list-card') : null; return card instanceof HTMLElement ? getComputedStyle(card).opacity : null; }

() => { const archivedBadge = document.querySelector('.council-card-status-badge-archived'); return archivedBadge instanceof HTMLElement ? archivedBadge.querySelector('svg') instanceof SVGElement : false; }
() => document.querySelector('button[aria-label="Refresh council conductor model options"]') instanceof HTMLButtonElement

() => { const card = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.council-card')).find((node) => node.textContent?.includes('UI Inspect Active Council')); if (card instanceof HTMLElement) { card.click(); } }
() => document.querySelector('button[aria-label="Refresh council conductor model options"]') instanceof HTMLButtonElement
